title: Tungsten Cube
description: And here we have the illustrious tungsten cube, aren't those things like, really heavy, RIGHT YOU ARE MY BOY.
body:
## DISCLAMER
### The audio clip used and the image of the tungsten cube are not mine, the clip was from raxdflipnote (see bottom of description for exact video), and the cube was from google

This adds a tungsten cube that when placed, a sound will play, then the cube will go straight down to the void, never to be seen again. This is one of my dumbest ideas to make yet, have fun.
